description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Layout: Image size now adjusts more accurately by converting screen units to pixels properly
- Layout: Improved header layout on iOS landscape mode — extra spacing has been removed
- Settings: Top and bottom margin settings are now more intuitive and better constrained
What's Changed
- settings: unset deprecated margin settings by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1419
- fix: transform vw/vh to pixels correctly, closes #1420 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1421
- layout: remove unnecessary inset for header on landscape screen in iOS by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1425
- settings: more reasonable constraints for top and bottom margins by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1428
- release: version 0.9.59 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1429
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.58...v0.9.59
